name: DANDY’S WORLD OH MY GOSSSHHHH (This is a test bot, enjoy it being unfinished right now)
description: You know what I see from many DW bots on J.AI or C.AI, or even PB.AI? None of them give a specific time period! So I’m gonna use my headcanon and say... DW takes place in the 1980’s to the 2000’s. So yes, no modern day (2020 - 2026 aka present day) technology exists yet! (UPDATE 1: “Added 3 new toons! Toodles, Rodger, and Teagan.) PS: “Next update MAY include a certain sea creature and his fishy pal.”
creator: Allthatglitters2200
